task: Write a Python function that takes an AWS S3 bucket name and returns True if it's a valid bucket name according to AWS naming rules (3-63 characters, lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens only, must start and end with letter or number).
Create a JSON object that represents an AWS IAM policy allowing a principal to perform GetObject and PutObject actions only on S3 buckets with names starting with 'prod-'.
Write a regular expression that matches valid AWS EC2 security group IDs (format: sg- followed by 8 or 17 hexadecimal characters).
